headline: Extra Space Storage Announces Addition of Crystal Call Maggelet and RJ Pittman to its Board of Directors
summary: At the Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) ("Extra Space") 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, on May 14, 2026, Crystal Call Maggelet and RJ Pittman were elected to the board of directors. The addition of these new board members reflects Extra Space's ongoing commitment to regular board refreshment and the integration of high-caliber leadership with expertise in real estate, retail operations strategy, and technological innovation.
